O0110I1B Other: Transfusions (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received transfusions while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1005 TRNSFSN_DSCHRG_CD TRNSFSN_DSCHRG_CD O0110I1C Other: Transfusions (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received transfusions in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1006 DLYS_ADMSN_CD DLYS_ADMSN_CD
